questions.question_text: Describe the process of electrolysis of brine.

parts.question_text: State the two products formed at the cathode and anode.
parts.model_answer: Cathode: Hydrogen gas. Anode: Chlorine gas.

parts.question_text: Explain why chlorine is produced at the anode and not oxygen.
parts.model_answer: Although OH- ions are present, Cl- ions are preferentially discharged because their concentration is higher and chlorine has a lower discharge potential under these conditions.
